description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design, featuring large rectangular windows and a clean white and gray facade. The front yard includes a swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a landscaped garden with various trees and shrubs, adding a touch of nature to the contemporary setting. A driveway leads to a small bridge and a carport area, while the rear of the house opens to a patio with outdoor seating. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is accentuated by a set of steps and a prominent front door, flanked by greenery. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, with an emphasis on open outdoor spaces and geometric forms.
description: A modern, cubic two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and landscaped gardens. The design features clean lines, a white and gray facade, and a prominent entryway with steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, pool, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, bridge, carport, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible carport, steps, and a more closed-off facade with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and extensive greenery around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a prominent door, and landscaped flanking greenery
